name: Legends Of Runeterra Converted: Call of the Mountain

cards.rules_text:
Ephemeral [i](This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.)[/i]
When Pesky Specter is destroyed, random target opponent creates two Pesky Specter tokens.
Whenever Pesky Specter is exiled, each player exiles each creature they control named Pesky Specter.

As an additional cost to cast this spell, remove three experience counters from yourself.
Target creature you control gets +2/+0, Trample, and First strike.

Focus [i](This instant cannot be cast during the combat phase or in response to another spell or ability.)[/i]

You get an experience counter.
Target creature you control gets First strike until the end of your turn.
Remove all abilities and counters from target non-legendary creature.
Creatures you control get +2/+2.
Exile all creatures opponents control with power 3 or less.
Put a stun counter onto two target creatures an opponent controls.
Exile target permanent.
{1}: Sacrifice Gem, remove 1 damage from target creature and give it +1/+0.

[i](You may cast a legendary sorcery only if you control a legendary creature or planeswalker.)[/i]
Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal X Celestial cards, then choose up to X Celestial cards revealed this way and add them to your hand where X is equal to the number of cards in your hand plus one, shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. Then untap all permanents you control.
Meteor Shower deals 4 damage to target creature and 1 damage to other target creature.

Target creature you control gets +0/+2 and a spellshield counter. [i](The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)[/i]
The next spell you cast this turn costs {1} less to cast.
Exile two target permanents.

Search your library for a legendary creature, exile it, then shuffle. You may cast the creature exiled this way from exile for as long as it remains exiled and it costs {1} less to cast. When the exiled creature enters, put two +1/+1 counters on it.

When The Destroyer enters, it gets +1/+0 for each Celestial creature you control, and for each Celestial card in your graveyard.

Flying, Fury [i](When this creature destroys another creature, put a +1/+1 counter on it.)[/i]

Undying [i](When this creature dies, if it had no +1/+1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it.)[/i]
When The Messenger enters, draw a card.

Trample, Challenger [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.)[/i]
When The Scourge enters, it gets +1/+0 for each Celestial creature you control, and for each Celestial card in your graveyard.

Target creature you control gets Challenger. If the target creature is a dragon, draw a card. [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.)[/i]

When Dragonguard Lieutenant enters, you may behold a Dragon, if you do Dragonguard Lieutenant gets Challenger. Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.)[/i]

When Dragonguard Lookout enters, you may behold a Dragon, if you do, untap all creatures you control. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase. [i](To behold a Dragon, choose a Dragon you control or reveal a Dragon card from your hand.)[/i]

When Egghead Researcher enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three dragon creatures, randomly choose one, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

For The Fallen costs {1} less to cast for each Knight you have cast this turn.
Create a Dauntless Vanguard token for each creature you control that was destroyed this turn.

Fury [i](When this creature destroys another creature, put a +1/+1 counter on it.)[/i]
When Kadregrin the Infernal enters, put four +1/+1 counters onto each other dragon creature you control.

Fury [i](When this creature destroys another creature, put a +1/+1 counter on it.)[/i]
Whenever Shyvana attacks, Shyvana gets +1/+1 until the start of your next upkeep.
Whenever a dragon creature you control deals combat damage, put that many Dragonguard counters onto Shyvana. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Shyvana has sixteen or more Dragonguard counters, remove all Dragonguard counters from Shyvana and transform her.

When Dragonguard Shyvana attacks, target creature you control fights target creature an opponent controls. If the target creature you control is a dragon, remove up to 5 damage from it if it survives the fight. [i](Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)[/i]

cards.rules_text: Fury, Scout [i](When this creature destroys another creature, put a +1/+1 counter on it. Once in your pre-combat main phase, you may have any number of creatures with Scout declare an attack without tapping. Opponents may declare blockers as if it were the combat phase.)[/i]
Instant and sorcery spells cost {1} more to cast.

Target creature you control fights target creature an opponent controls. If the target creature you control is a dragon, remove 5 damage if it survives the fight. [i](Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)[/i]

Whenever a creature you control enters, that creature gets +1/+1 and challenger until the end of your next turn. [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.)[/i]

Target creature you control gets +1/+0 and first strike. If the target creature has first strike, it gets double strike instead.

Whenever another creature you control targets Fuzzy Caretaker, Fuzzy Caretaker gets +0/+3 until your next upkeep.
Whenever Fuzzy Caretaker attacks, other attacking target creature you control gets +3/+0 until the end of turn.

Recall a creature or landmark you control to recall a creature or landmark an opponent controls. [i](A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)[/i]

Whenever Lulu attacks, other attacking target creature you control has base power and toughness 4/4 until the start of your next upkeep.
Whenever a creature you control targets another creature you control, put a Whimsy counter on Lulu. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Lulu has three or more Whimsy counters, remove all Whimsy counters from Lulu and transform her.

At the start of your upkeep, sacrifice the nontoken creature with the highest mana value among creatures you control, then reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature with a mana value that costs 1 more than the sacrificed creature, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

Tap a creature an opponent controls and put a stun counter on it. Then if you control a legendary creature named Darius or Darius, The Hand of Noxus, untap all creatures you control and after this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

At the start of your end step, if Arrel the Tracker was targeted by a source you control, Arrel the Tracker deals damage equal to its power to the creature with the lowest power among creatures target opponent controls.

When Blade Squire is destroyed, search your library for a Rune card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
When Brutal Hunter enters, it gets First strike until the end of your next turn.
Target opponent reveals their hand, then discards the creature with the lowest power from their hand.

At the end of your turn, the creature with highest power among creatures you control, and the creature with lowest power among creatures target opponent controls fight. [i](Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)[/i]

Whenever Riven enters, attacks, or at the end of your turn if Riven did not attack, search your library for a Rune card, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle.
The first time you cast a card named Blade of the Exile, transform Riven.
Partner
cards.rules_text2:
Whenever Riven enters, attacks, or at the end of your turn if Riven did not attack, search your library and/or graveyard and/or exile for a Rune card, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle.
Each turn the first time a source you control increases Riven's power, put that many +1/+1 counters on Riven.

cards.rules_text: When Runeweaver enters, search your library for a Rune card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

[/i]Whenever a land you control with a Freljord counter is tapped for mana, its controller adds an additional one mana of any type that land can produce.

Choose 3, 4, or 5, then reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal that many legendary creatures, randomly choose two with different names from among them, and put them onto the battlefield under your control, they have base power and toughness 10/10, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

Vulnerable [i](When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.)[/i]

At the start of your upkeep, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a legendary creature, exile it, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

Juggernaut [i](After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.)[/i]
